title: viola ingrica
intro: Viola ingrica, also known as the mountain pansy or alpine pansy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Viola genus. It is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Viola ingrica have been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, anxiety, and insomnia, due to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. Herbal preparations of Viola ingrica are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
